specific_mechanism: Change-ringing: bells permute through 5040+ permutations in canonical sequences (Plain Bob, Stedman); permutation-spectrum allocates the bell order
llm_application: LLM expert-route permutation: route tokens through expert permutation sequences; permutation-spectrum allocates expert order per layer.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes campanology spectral-allocation mapping as proposed.
